hero.alt: Hero instrument plate showing the H1 'AEGIS Gate Test' engraved on a matte panel with warm teal edge lighting and precise vector readouts; reflects the page's dark-first, clinical instrument aesthetic

feature_1.alt: Overhead instrument grid with three micro-panels rendered as vector UI elements; warm teal accents and Berkeley Mono status lines make it read as a developer instrument rack.

feature_2.alt: Tight close-up of numeric readouts and inline code status lines in Berkeley Mono; warm teal highlights and a sparse soft-lime status dot emphasize precision metrics.

feature_3.alt: Isometric vector schematic of the pipeline with connectors in warm teal and labeled nodes in warm gray; left-aligned composition provides layout breathing room for the page.

social_proof.alt: Minimal testimonial accent card silhouette against a matte panel texture; warm teal microcopy highlight and quiet panel seams maintain the instrument aesthetic without people or photography.
